titleStmt.title: SII 27.384: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 384. (A.R. No. 544 of 1928-29.) BAINDŪRU, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the well of a private house near the tank called ‘Hosakere’.
This record registers a gift of land in Yeḍatoṟe, after purchase for feeding brahmaṇas in the maṭha built by him, by Vīrūseṭṭi, the younger brother of Bemmaṇāseṭṭi.
It is dated the cyclic year Vikṛita Chaitra śu. 1 the details being insufficient for verification in the absence of the mention of Śaka year and the weekday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīgaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ nirvi
ghnamastu namastuṁga sirastuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trai
lōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē svastiśrī vi
kṛti saṁvatsarada cayitra śuda 1 ralu śrīmatu beṁmaṇa
seṭṭiya taṁma vīruseṭṭiyaru tāu kaṭṭida maṭhadalli mattaṁ Uṁba brā
hmara ja 3 kke biṭṭa taḷada vivara taṟe yavoḷage dodara hebbāra
namaga gōviṁdahebbārana kayyali koṁḍamūlada bāḷige gaḍi mūḍalu
vōbahebbārutiya bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi teṁkalu madyastaru maṭhakke bi
ṭṭa bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi paḍuvalu naḍava heddārigaḍi baḍagalu Aṁmma
hebbārina bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa gē
ṇigade hā 60 ge kaṭṭidagēṇi Akki kaṁ 40 lkedalu mu 7 Adakkete
ṟu varaga 1 tā 3 mattaṁ maga U hebārana moṁmaga nāraṇahebbā
ra Avana lli tāyamakkaḷu yibbaru yivaru mūvaru kayyali bi
ḍāruvāruvāgi koṁḍa sarvvasvakke gaḍimūḍalu keṟigaḍi baṁda hā 9 neva
ṇayana madavaḷigeya bāḷugaḍi teṁkalu madhyastara bāḷugaḍi paḍuva
lu yeḍataṟiya hebbārana bāḷu gaḍi baḍagalu hariva tōḍu gaḍi yiṁ
tī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa gade hāne 90 ge kaṭina gēṇi lke kaṁ 40
mu 40 yidakke teṟu 30 hāne gadege guḷi 32 mattaṁ bāḷu gaḍi mūḍa
lu madhyastara hittalu gaḍi teṁkalu keṟigaḍi paḍuvalu madhyastara hi
gaḍi baḍagalu Aṁṇuseṭṭiya hitilu gaḍiyiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁ
doḷagaṇa teṁgina hittilige kaṭṭida gēṇi varaga 4 �yo hittila ga ba
koṭa Artha vara ga 56 U Arthabaṁdaru Urattimūlabaṁdarū ma
ṭhada dharmakke biṭṭaddu mattaṁ ceṁmiya saṁkuseṭṭiya kayyali
mūlava koṁḍa bāḷige gaḍi mūḍalu hariva tōḍugaḍi teṁkalu
Ārebaḷiya puṭṭi Aṁṇuseṭṭiya bāḷugaḍi paḍuva ma
raseya bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi baḍagalu puṭṭi Aṁṇuseṭṭiya
bāḷina Acu barada hāṁge baḍagalu bāsenagadeya Aṁcu
gaḍi yiṁtī nālkugaḍiya voḷagaṇa gade nāgaṁḍugada lke ma
2 . ge kaṭida gēṇi Aki kaṁ 40 lke mu 5
ṁ gadeguḷigaṁ va 3 tā 2 mattaṁ
ke Utāra mataṁ basavanakeṟiya bayalu
cina taṁge beṁmakanavara kayyali mūlava koṁḍu
dagaḍi mūḍalu hariva tōḍugaḍi teṁkalu saṁku
gade teṁka gaḍi paḍuvalu saṁkaraseṭṭiya ya bāḷina
gaḍi baḍagalu kariyagau seṭṭitiya bāḷina Aṁcu gaḍi
yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa gaḍi koḍage saha 70 hāne Aṁ
tadake kaṭida gēṇi Akki kaṁ 40 lke mu 7 Adakke teru 47
Ubhayaṁ śāsana 2 kkaṁ leṟu da Akki baḷage teṟa lruttiThis line is engraved around the arch at the top� slab.
Digital edition of SII 27.384 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
